title: paraq #6561
definition:
1) to tear apart or away, tear off, break away
    1a) (Qal) to tear away, snatch, rescue
    1b) (Piel) to tear off
    1c) (Hithpael) to tear off from oneself, be broken off, be broken
        in pieces
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to tear apart or away, tear off, break away
    1a) (Qal) to tear away, snatch, rescue
    1b) (Piel) to tear off
    1c) (Hithpael) to tear off from oneself, be broken off, be broken
        in pieces

    NASB:  to tear apart or away
